  <!-- ─ STAGE NAVIGATION ICONS ─ placed beneath the vitruvian body.
       Stage One (Heart Coherence) and Stage Two (Interoceptive Meaning)
       are the two interactive anchors of the intro screen. The flex-row
       container auto-centers and will accept further stages without
       layout change. -->
  <div id="stage-icons">
    <div class="stage-icon" id="stage1-icon"
         role="button"
         aria-label="Stage One — Heart Coherence"
         onclick="showInstructions();">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,"
           alt="Stage One · Heart Coherence"
           draggable="false">
      <!-- Nine sparkles around the heart — matching Stage 2's count,
           size range (8-11px), and density. Warm amber tone kept. Delays
           staggered across the 2.6s cycle at ~0.29s intervals so there's
           always one near peak. -->
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:18%;left:50%;--sz:11px;--dl:0s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:28%;left:28%;--sz:9px;--dl:-0.29s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:28%;left:72%;--sz:9px;--dl:-0.58s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:18%;--sz:8px;--dl:-0.87s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:82%;--sz:8px;--dl:-1.16s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:70%;left:30%;--sz:9px;--dl:-1.44s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:70%;left:70%;--sz:9px;--dl:-1.73s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:88%;left:50%;--sz:10px;--dl:-2.02s"></span>
      <span class="s1-sparkle" style="top:6%;left:50%;--sz:8px;--dl:-2.31s"></span>
      <div class="stage-icon-label">Stage One</div>
      <div class="stage-icon-sublabel">Heart Coherence</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ─ STAGE TWO ICON — Golden solar mandala, centered directly beneath
         the Vitruvian figure. Opens Stage Two's instruction screen. ─ -->
    <div class="stage-icon" id="stage2-icon"
         role="button"
         aria-label="Stage Two — Body-Sensation Mapping"
         onclick="showStage2Instructions();">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,"
           alt="Stage Two · Body-Sensation Mapping"
           draggable="false">
      <!-- 10 sparkles — major reduction. Just the 8 cardinal/corner
           anchors + 2 center overlap. Fades fully between pulses, cycle 3.4s.
           At any moment only 2-3 sparkles are even visible. -->
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:50%;--sz:11px;--dl:-0.000s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:22%;left:30%;--sz:9px;--dl:-0.340s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:22%;left:70%;--sz:9px;--dl:-0.680s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:78%;left:30%;--sz:9px;--dl:-1.020s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:78%;left:70%;--sz:9px;--dl:-1.360s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:18%;left:50%;--sz:8px;--dl:-1.700s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:82%;left:50%;--sz:8px;--dl:-2.040s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:18%;--sz:8px;--dl:-2.380s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:82%;--sz:8px;--dl:-2.720s"></span>
      <span class="s2-sparkle" style="top:50%;left:50%;--sz:7px;--dl:-3.060s"></span>
      <div class="stage-icon-label">Stage Two</div>
      <div class="stage-icon-sublabel">Body-Sensation Mapping</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ─ STAGE THREE ICON (LOCKED) — State Shifting. Non-interactive;
         placed on the same horizontal line as Stages One/Two beneath
         the Vitruvian body. Locked until unlocked by prior stages. ─ -->
    <div class="stage-icon" id="stage3-icon"
         role="img"
         aria-label="Stage Three — State Shifting (Locked)"
         aria-disabled="true">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,"
           alt="Stage Three · State Shifting · Locked"
           draggable="false">
      <div class="stage-icon-label">Stage Three</div>
      <div class="stage-icon-sublabel">State Shifting</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ─ STAGE FOUR ICON (LOCKED) — Mirror World. Non-interactive;
         completes the four-symbol horizontal row of the intro screen. ─ -->
    <div class="stage-icon" id="stage4-icon"
         role="img"
         aria-label="Stage Four — Mirror World (Locked)"
         aria-disabled="true">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,"
           alt="Stage Four · Mirror World · Locked"
           draggable="false">
      <div class="stage-icon-label">Stage Four</div>
      <div class="stage-icon-sublabel">Mirror World</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Bottom electrical heart, touch hint, and footer removed:
       the golden Stage One icon above is now the sole interactive
       element on this screen. -->
</div>

<!-- ================================================================
     SCREEN 2 — INSTRUCTIONS
     ================================================================ -->
<div class="screen hidden" id="screen-instructions">
  <div class="instr-layout">

    <!-- HEADER (full-width band) -->
    <div class="instr-header-row">
      <div class="instr-heading">Heart Coherence</div>
      <div class="instr-sub">Quick Coherence® &middot; HeartMath Institute</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════ THEORY ═══════════════
         Sits above the technique. Teaches the physiology so the
         practitioner understands why the protocol is constructed
         the way it is. Separate from the protocol below so the
         two don't clutter each other. -->
    <div class="instr-theory-row">

      <p class="theory-lede">
        The practice you are about to do is not a visualisation, a relaxation exercise
        or a spiritual technique in disguise. It is a <em>physiological protocol. </em> 
        A specific breathing cadence held in concert with a specific quality of felt
        experience, producing a measurable state the cardiovascular, autonomic,
        endocrine, and cortical systems enter together. The theory below exists so
        that you know what is happening in your body when you practise, and why
        love in particular is the feeling the body is being asked to sustain.
      </p>

      <div class="theory-grid">

        <div class="theory-card">
          <div class="theory-card-eyebrow">I &middot; The heart as an intelligent organ</div>
          <div class="theory-card-title">Why love is already in the cells</div>
          <div class="theory-card-body">
            The heart is not a pump with feelings attached. It has its own nervous
            system of roughly forty thousand sensory neurons (Armour's
            neurocardiology) that <em>sense, learn and remember independently</em>
            of the brain. which is why a transplanted, denervated heart continues
            to beat coordinately. It is also an <strong>endocrine organ</strong>:
            it synthesises oxytocin, with concentrations in the right atrium roughly
            nineteen times higher than in uterine tissue (Jankowski et al.,
            <em>PNAS</em>, 1998). Every affiliative experience you have ever had. 
            Being held, loving another, being loved. All of it has inscribed itself on this
            tissue. The feeling of love is not retrieved from memory in the mind;
            it is <strong>re-activated in tissue that already holds it</strong>. This
            is why the instruction is to soften the chest and let it surface, not
            to imagine or construct it.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="theory-card">
          <div class="theory-card-eyebrow">II &middot; Resonance at 0.1 Hz</div>
          <div class="theory-card-title">Why the breath is the carrier</div>
          <div class="theory-card-body">
            The cardiovascular loop, so the heart, baroreceptors, brainstem, vascular
            tree; it has an intrinsic transit delay of roughly five seconds, which
            gives it a natural <strong>resonance frequency near 0.1 Hz</strong>0
            (Lehrer &amp; Gevirtz, 2014). When you breathe at about six per minute,
            respiration, heart rate, and blood pressure phase-align; heart-rate
            variability amplitude saturates; the vagus nerve modulates the
            sino-atrial node with each exhale; and the heart-rate trace smooths
            into a clean sine wave. Balaji &amp; McCraty's analysis of <strong>1.8
            million sessions</strong> (<em>Scientific Reports</em>, 2025) confirmed
            this peak across the global population. The breath is not the point.
            It is the carrier wave that allows the feeling to inscribe itself on
            physiology.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="theory-card">
          <div class="theory-card-eyebrow">III &middot; Why love, not just breath</div>
          <div class="theory-card-title">What love adds that breath does not</div>
          <div class="theory-card-body">
            Breath alone at 0.1&nbsp;Hz produces coherence. Love on top of it
            recruits four additional pathways. First, the
            <strong>caregiving-and-reward network</strong> - medial orbitofrontal
            cortex, anterior cingulate, ventral striatum, VTA - which uniquely
            deactivates the amygdala and social-judgment circuitry (Bartels &amp;
            Zeki, 2000, 2004). Second, <strong>oxytocin release</strong>, which
            potentiates vagal efferent activity and independently suppresses
            cortisol. Third, a narrow high-amplitude HRV spectral peak that
            appreciation produces and anger does not, <em>even at matched
            respiration</em> (McCraty et al., 1995). Fourth - and this is the
            strongest cellular evidence - loving-kindness meditation protects
            telomere length where attention-only mindfulness does not (Le Nguyen
            et al., 2019). The love component, not just the attention component,
            has cellular consequences.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="theory-card">
          <div class="theory-card-eyebrow">IV &middot; Authenticity as physiology</div>
          <div class="theory-card-title">Why sincerity is not a preference</div>
          <div class="theory-card-body">
            The oxytocin–vagal–reward axis does not reliably open for hollow performance. Duchenne-smile research links genuine enjoyment with involuntary eye-muscle recruitment and distinct frontal brain activity, while Gross and Levenson’s suppression work shows that performative emotional control can increase sympathetic load rather than produce clean regulation. But this does not mean feeling cannot be intensified. It means the system must begin from a sincere signal. Once honest warmth is online, attention can locate its bodily coordinates, follow its natural vector, and amplify it through alignment. A small true feeling can become powerful when strengthened along its own trajectory. A large forced feeling collapses because it is imposed against the organism’s truth. The technique therefore does not prohibit intensity; it prohibits falsification. Let the feeling come forward, find its coordinate, then move upward through its line of coherence.
            
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="theory-divider">The Technique</div>

    </div>

    <!-- LEFT: Animated body -->
    <div class="instr-body-col">
      <div class="instr-body-container">
        <!-- Breath rings centered on chest area -->
        <div class="ring-wrap">
          <div class="instr-ring" style="width:48px;height:48px;margin-top:22px;margin-left:-24px;left:50%;position:absolute;animation-delay:0s"></div>
          <div class="instr-ring" style="width:70px;height:70px;margin-top:11px;margin-left:-35px;left:50%;position:absolute;animation-delay:.5s"></div>
          <div class="instr-ring" style="width:96px;height:96px;margin-top:-2px;margin-left:-48px;left:50%;position:absolute;animation-delay:1s"></div>
        </div>

        <svg class="instr-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 260" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <defs>
            <radialGradient id="bGrad2" cx="50%" cy="38%" r="62%">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,.08)"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,.01)"/>
            </radialGradient>
            <radialGradient id="hGrad2" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="72%">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#cc2222"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#990000"/>
            </radialGradient>
            <radialGradient id="hGlow2" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(200,50,50,.75)"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
            </radialGradient>
            <filter id="hf2" x="-40%" y="-40%" width="180%" height="180%">
              <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.5" result="b"/>
              <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
            </filter>
          </defs>
          <ellipse cx="50" cy="18" rx="16" ry="17" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.6)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <rect x="44" y="34" width="12" height="10" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.33)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <path d="M16 50 Q6 57 5 78 L8 155 Q9 162 16 163 L34 165 L36 238 Q36 243 44 244 L48 244 L50 195 L52 195 L54 244 L58 244 Q65 243 65 238 L67 165 L84 163 Q91 162 92 155 L95 78 Q94 57 84 50 Q67 43 50 43 Q33 43 16 50Z"
                fill="url(#bGrad2)" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.6)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <path d="M16 54 Q4 63 2 90 Q1 115 4 135 Q6 141 11 141 Q15 141 16 135 L18 112 L20 70 L18 56Z" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.28)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <path d="M84 54 Q96 63 98 90 Q99 115 96 135 Q94 141 89 141 Q85 141 84 135 L82 112 L80 70 L82 56Z" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.28)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="50" y1="45" x2="50" y2="163" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.07)" stroke-width=".7" stroke-dasharray="3,4"/>
          <path d="M34 68 Q50 62 66 68" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.08)" stroke-width=".7"/>
          <path d="M32 77 Q50 71 68 77" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.08)" stroke-width=".7"/>
          <path d="M30 86 Q50 79 70 86" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.08)" stroke-width=".7"/>

          <!-- Lungs animated -->
          <ellipse cx="38" cy="82" rx="12" ry="19" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.15)" stroke-width=".9" stroke-dasharray="2,3">
            <animate attributeName="rx" values="10;14;10" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            <animate attributeName="ry" values="16;23;16" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            <animate attributeName="opacity" values=".5;1;.5" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </ellipse>
          <ellipse cx="62" cy="82" rx="12" ry="19" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.15)" stroke-width=".9" stroke-dasharray="2,3">
            <animate attributeName="rx" values="10;14;10" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            <animate attributeName="ry" values="16;23;16" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            <animate attributeName="opacity" values=".5;1;.5" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </ellipse>

          <!-- Heart glow animated -->
          <circle cx="46" cy="79" r="12" fill="url(#hGlow2)">
            <animate attributeName="r" values="8;16;8" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            <animate attributeName="opacity" values=".35;.75;.35" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </circle>

          <!-- Heart animated -->
          <path d="M46 93 C46 93 30 82 30 72 C30 63 37 59 42 63 C44 65 46 68 46 68 C46 68 48 65 50 63 C55 59 62 63 62 72 C62 82 46 93 46 93 Z"
                fill="url(#hGrad2)" filter="url(#hf2)"
                style="transform-box:fill-box;transform-origin:50% 50%">
            <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="scale"
              values="1;1.2;1.07;1" keyTimes="0;0.3;0.5;1"
              dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite" additive="sum"/>
          </path>

          <!-- Vagus nerve animated -->
          <path d="M48 61 Q47 44 50 35" fill="none" stroke="rgba(180,60,60,.22)" stroke-width=".9" stroke-dasharray="2,4">
            <animate attributeName="stroke-opacity" values=".12;.45;.12" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </path>

          <!-- Focus arrow -->
          <path d="M18 98 L30 83" stroke="rgba(180,60,60,.3)" stroke-width=".8" stroke-dasharray="2,3"
                marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
          <defs>
            <marker id="arr" markerWidth="5" markerHeight="5" refX="2.5" refY="2.5" orient="auto">
              <path d="M0,0 L5,2.5 L0,5Z" fill="rgba(180,60,60,.3)"/>
            </marker>
          </defs>
        </svg>
      </div>

      <!-- HRV panel -->
      <div class="hrv-panel">
        <div class="hrv-panel-label">Heart Rate Variability Pattern</div>
        <div class="hrv-row">
          <div class="hrv-row-label coherent">Coherent</div>
          <svg width="100%" height="18" viewBox="0 0 180 18">
            <path id="hrv-coherent" d="" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.6)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="hrv-row">
          <div class="hrv-row-label incoherent">Incoherent</div>
          <svg width="100%" height="18" viewBox="0 0 180 18">
            <path id="hrv-incoherent" d="" fill="none" stroke="rgba(180,40,40,.35)" stroke-width="1"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT: Instructions -->
    <div class="instr-text-col">

      <!-- ════════════ UNIFIED INSTRUCTION ════════════
           One seamless flow. Each step: a clear instruction and
           the single mechanism that matters. Love is held from
           step two through to the end of the session. -->
      <div class="depth-content active">

        <div class="step-block">
          <div class="step-num">01</div>
          <div>
            <div class="step-title">Breathe Through the Heart</div>
            <div class="step-desc">
              Rest your attention in the centre of the heart. Let the breath flow in and out through that spot. Five seconds in, five seconds out, unforced. At this cadence the cardiovascular system hits its natural resonance near 0.1 Hz and HRV smooths into a clean wave. The breath is the scaffolding.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step-block">
          <div class="step-num">02</div>
          <div>
            <div class="step-title">Heart Feeling</div>
            <div class="step-desc">
              Activate a sincere feeling of love in the heart. Not as an idea held in the mind, but as a felt sense in the body - it is already there, in the tissue. Soften the chest and let it come forward. Breathe it through the heart as it arrives. This is the regenerative feeling you sustain for the rest of the session.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step-block">
          <div class="step-num">03</div>
          <div>
            <div class="step-title">Deepen</div>
            <div class="step-desc">
              Stay with the love and deepen it. The effort stays, never so hard that it takes you away from the feeling, always enough to sustain it and move to a subtler, deeper and more powerful level. The longer it is sustained, the stronger it becomes.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="instr-safety">
          If attention to the heart feels distressing, open your eyes, shorten the session, and let <em>ease</em> lead before love.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FOOTER (full-width band): voice left · duration right -->
    <div class="instr-footer-row">
      <div class="voice-options">
        <div class="voice-options-label">Voice</div>
        <label class="intro-toggle-row">
          <input type="checkbox" id="intro-toggle" checked>
          <span class="intro-toggle-label">Play 30-second introduction</span>
        </label>
        <label class="intro-toggle-row">
          <input type="checkbox" id="zero-voice-toggle">
          <span class="intro-toggle-label">Zero voiceover · silent session</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="dur-label">Tap to Begin · Choose Duration</div>
        <div class="duration-row">
          <button class="dur-btn start" onclick="startWithDuration(900)">15 min</button>
          <button class="dur-btn start" onclick="startWithDuration(1800)">30 min</button>
          <button class="dur-btn start" onclick="startWithDuration(3600)">1 hr</button>
          <button class="dur-btn start" onclick="startWithDuration(7200)">2 hr</button>
          <button class="dur-btn start" onclick="startWithDuration(10800)">3 hr</button>
          
          
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================
     SCREEN 3 — SESSION
     ================================================================ -->
<div class="screen hidden" id="screen-session">

  <div class="session-hdr">
    <div class="session-title" id="session-title-label">Heart Coherence · Introduction</div>
    <div class="session-timer-disp" id="session-timer">00:30</div>
    <button class="session-end" onclick="endSession()">End</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Full-screen intro overlay — sits over entire session screen -->
  <div class="intro-overlay" id="intro-overlay">
    <div class="intro-inner">
      <div class="intro-orb-wrap">
        <div class="intro-orb"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="intro-timer-row">
        <div class="intro-cd-num" id="intro-cd-num">30</div>
        <div class="intro-cd-label">seconds</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intro-text-block">
        <div class="intro-line" id="intro-spoken-line">&nbsp;</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
